programme.title: Black Water
programme.desc: When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative joins forces with another prisoner to break free. Stars Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dolph Lundgren (2018)

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: (1958) Western starring Alan Ladd. A soldier returns home after the Civil War to find his wife dead and his son shocked into silence. He rides out, determined to find both a cure and justice.

programme.title: The Quick And The Dead
programme.desc: (1963) War drama starring Victor French and Majel Barrett. With the aid of local partisans, a group of American soldiers try to make it through enemy-occupied Italy to safety.

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A group of women head to the airport bar ahead of their trip to Las Vegas for a bachelorette party, and airline staff are excited in anticipation for the company's Southwest Spirit party. S1Ep8

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, a swarm of dangerous bees have set up a hive at Gate 13, and a customer supervisor is excited to learn that a royal passenger will be travelling through LAX. S1Ep9

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Ex-Wife Killer
programme.desc: A woman vouches for her ex-husband after he seemingly kills his new wife in self-defence but after he is let off the hook, she discovers his elaborate ploy. Starring Marguerite Moreau (2017)

programme.title: My Stepfather's Secret
programme.desc: (2019) Thriller with Vanessa Marcil. A college student returns home to discover her mother has a new fiancé. But as she finds out more about him, should it be alarm bells rather than wedding bells?

programme.title: Labor, Lies And Murder
programme.desc: (2022) Thriller with Brooke Burfitt. A pregnant woman hires a doula to help with her home birth. But as delivery day approaches and shocking secrets emerge, who can she really trust?

programme.title: Killer in Law
programme.desc: (2018) High-stakes thriller with Kelly Sullivan. Melissa encounters the in-law from hell when her husband's long-lost mother returns. As she unleashes a twisted plan, someone is not needed any more...

programme.title: Mommy's Cheating Scandal
programme.desc: (2021) Thriller based on real-life events, with Karis Cameron. A student gets caught in an admission scandal in a bid to get into a good college. A manhunt for the ring leader has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: (2021) Deadly drama with Scout Taylor-Compton. A pair of adopted twins are surprised to meet their triplet who was separated from them at birth, but three's a crowd - especially when one's a killer.

programme.title: Fatal Justice
programme.desc: (2012) Crime thriller with Cynthia Watros. After a robbery leaves her beloved niece in a coma and the cops have no leads, a woman goes from victim to vigilante and takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: (2008) Western with Luke Perry, C. Thomas Howell and Kim Coates. After killing an innocent man, an ex-lawman on a quest for revenge makes a pledge that takes him straight into the path of his prey.

programme.title: First Kill
programme.desc: (2017) Action thriller with Bruce Willis and Hayden Christensen. A father rapidly runs out of options when his family vacation is derailed by murderous criminals and his son is taken hostage.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: (2018) Action-packed abduction thriller with Bruce Willis. When his fiancée is kidnapped by sex traffickers, a former US Army Ranger and his brothers join forces with a veteran detective to find her.
